heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 90–576, title I, § 10382 Stat. 1091Oct. 16, 1968
label: 15h to 15m Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 90–576, title I, § 10382 Stat. 1091Oct. 16, 1968
notes: Section 15h, acts , ; , , provided for a popular name. Subject matter of section prior to its amendment related to the development of vocational education in States and Territories, appropriations and their allotment, and matching of funds by States and Territories, and was replaced by sections 15j and 15k of this title.June 8, 1936, ch. 541, § 149 Stat. 1488Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 725, § 160 Stat. 775

Section 15i, acts , ; , title I, § 101, ; , title III, § 301, ; , , ; , , , defined “States and Territories”, “State plan”, “State board”, and “Smith-Hughes Vocational Education Act”.June 8, 1936, ch. 541, § 249 Stat. 1488Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 72560 Stat. 775Aug. 2, 1956, ch. 87170 Stat. 925Pub. L. 86–70, § 18(b)(2)73 Stat. 144Pub. L. 86–624, § 14(b)(3)74 Stat. 414June 25, 1959July 12, 1960

Section 15j, acts , ; , title I, § 101, ; , title III, § 301, ; , , authorized appropriations for programs in vocational education in agriculture, home economics, trades and industry, distributive occupations, and fishery trades.June 8, 1936, ch. 541, § 349 Stat. 1489Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 72560 Stat. 775Aug. 2, 1956, ch. 87170 Stat. 925Aug. 8, 1956, ch. 1039, § 270 Stat. 1126

Section 15k, acts , ; , title I, § 101, ; , title III, § 301, , required that Federal funds be matched by State and local funds in order to receive benefits of section 15i et seq. of this title.June 8, 1936, ch. 541, § 449 Stat. 1489Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 72560 Stat. 776Aug. 2, 1956, ch. 87170 Stat. 925

Section 15, acts , ; 1940 Reorg. Plan No. III, § 1(a)(1), eff. , 5 F.R. 2107, ; , title I, § 101, ; , title III, § 301, , provided for method of payment of funds to which the State or Territory was entitled under section 15i et seq. of this title.lJune 8, 1936, ch. 541, § 549 Stat. 148954 Stat. 1231Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 72560 Stat. 776Aug. 2, 1956, ch. 87170 Stat. 925June 30, 1940

Section 15m, acts , ; , title I, § 101, ; , title, III, § 301, , made funds available for salary and expenses of State directors.June 8, 1936, ch. 541, § 649 Stat. 1489Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 72560 Stat. 777Aug. 2, 1956, ch. 87170 Stat. 925
For general subject matter of sections 15i to 15m, see section 1241 et seq. of this title.
Effective Date of Repeal, , , provided that the repeal is effective .Pub. L. 90–576, title I, § 10382 Stat. 1091Oct. 16, 1968July 1, 1969
